name: Azur Lane: Slow Ahead!
original_name: アズールレーン びそくぜんしんっ！
overview: This is a slightly peculiar world where the shipgirls live in. A lively and enjoyable school life for girls from different factions will begin at the naval port of Azur Lane. Living out their lives to the fullest, these girls get into various shenanigans—slowly but surely!

trailers.title: Anime AzurLane: Slow Ahead! | OFFICIAL TRAILER
